---
name: Bug report
about: Something doesn't work (a skip button isn't tapped, a crash, etc.)
title: ""
labels: bug
---

**What happened?**
A clear description of the bug.

**Which app + screen?**
e.g. Netflix → Skip Intro; Disney+ → end-of-episode card.

**Device**
- Model + Android version:
- SkipperKit version (or commit):

**Logcat (very helpful)**
If you can, capture Logcat filtered to tags `SkipperKit`, `SkipperKitInspector`, and
`SkipperKitDiscovery` while reproducing, and paste the relevant lines. (These contain
on-screen UI text only — no video or personal media.)

**Expected vs actual**
What you expected to happen, and what happened instead.
